prompts.text: Before they tap, ask: "Which picture shows a [word]? What can you see that tells you?"
After a correct match, say: "Yes! That's [word] — can you use it in a sentence?"
Ask: "What other things belong in the same group as [word]?" — builds category thinking.
Point to the written word and say: "Look at the letters — it starts with [letter]. Can you find that letter?"
